name: Sesame Buns
recipeIngredient: 1 Basic yeast dough; see recipe for
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:15
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a ball and place on greased baking sheets. Press down lightly with fingertips to resemble a bun. Cover and let rise in a warm place (85 degrees), free from drafts, about 30 minutes or until doubled in bulk. Combine egg white and water, beating until frothy; brush over buns. Sprinkle buns with sesame seeds. Bake at 400 degrees for 15 to 20 minutes or until browned. Yield: 8 buns.
